sql: SELECT SUM(f.BRUT_PRIM_TL) AS total_üretim FROM AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK f JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p ON f.POLICE_ID = p.POLICE_ID JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH t ON p.TANZIM_TARIH_ID = t.TARIH_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(t.TARIH, 'YYYY') = '2025' FETCH FIRST 200 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Uses BRUT_PRIM_TL from FACT_POL_POLICE_EK joined with POL_POLICE_OZET and GNL_TARIH to filter by 2025 tanzim tarihi.
risk_notes: Assumes correct join paths and that BRUT_PRIM_TL is the correct measure for 'total üretim'.
description:
Question answered: What is the total production (in TL) for policies where the main policy date falls in the year 2025?
Tables used: AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK, AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET, AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH
Filters: Policies where the TANZIM_TARIH (registration date) is in the year 2025
Grouping/measures: Summing the BRUT_PRIM_TL column
Expected output columns: total_üretim
Assumptions: The TANZIM_TARIH field represents the main registration date of the policy.

sql: SELECT SUM(f.BRUT_PRIM_TL) AS total_üretim FROM AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK f JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p ON f.POLICE_ID = p.POLICE_ID JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH t ON p.ANA_POLICE_TANZIM_TARIH_ID = t.TARIH_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(t.TARIH, 'YYYY') = '2025' FETCH FIRST 200 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Filters using ANA_POLICE_TANZIM_TARIH_ID instead of TANZIM_TARIH_ID to align with metadata join options.
risk_notes: May include different data than expected if ANA_POLICE_TANZIM_TARIH_ID differs from TANZIM_TARIH_ID.
description:
Question answered: What is the total production (in TL) for policies where the main policy registration date falls in the year 2025?
Tables used: AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK, AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET, AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH
Filters: Policies where the ANA_POLICE_TANZIM_TARIH (main policy registration date) is in the year 2025
Grouping/measures: Summing the BRUT_PRIM_TL column
Expected output columns: total_üretim
Assumptions: The ANA_POLICE_TANZIM_TARIH field represents the registration date of the main policy.

sql: SELECT SUM(f.BRUT_PRIM_TL) AS total_üretim FROM AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK f JOIN AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p ON f.POLICE_ID = p.POLICE_ID JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH t ON p.BASLANGIC_TARIH_ID = t.TARIH_ID WHERE TO_CHAR(t.TARIH, 'YYYY') = '2025' FETCH FIRST 200 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Uses BASLANGIC_TARIH_ID as an alternative join path to filter by year.
risk_notes: May not align with intended 'tanzim tarihi' logic if BASLANGIC_TARIH_ID is unrelated to tanzim tarihi.
description:
Question answered: What is the total production (in TL) for policies where the start date falls in the year 2025?
Tables used: AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK, AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET, AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH
Filters: Policies where the BASLANGIC_TARIH (start date) is in the year 2025
Grouping/measures: Summing the BRUT_PRIM_TL column
Expected output columns: total_üretim
Assumptions: The BASLANGIC_TARIH field represents the start date of the policy.
